requiredNativeCapabilities: No third-party analytics SDK until privacy forms are updated
No external purchase links for digital goods
StoreKit consumable products for paid G, or disabled purchase UI
qaChecklist: Launches offline if bundled assets are used
Launches from cold start without a blank WebView
No horizontal overflow on small iPhone
Game audio unlocks after first tap
Reduced motion and high contrast settings persist
G purchase flow either calls StoreKit or is hidden/disabled
No CLOSED TEST, TEST AD, TEST GRANT, or purchase mock copy in the App Review binary
